creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
Have to reopen this PR. After the failes Icu update and the revert.
If I install der thunderbird package all works.
If I compile thunderbird  I have still no text in the menues. I have recompiled icu, harfbuzz, sqlite3 and some other packages, does not help.
(Have I something overlooked - don't want recompile recursive. This are over 300 packages).
